prd.oneLiner: Connect leave policy, requests and approvals, attendance exceptions, balance calculations, and organization reporting in one flow.
prd.goal: Process 95% of leave requests through self-service and reduce attendance reconciliation errors by 30%.
prd.whyNow: Leave balances, clock records, and approval history are separated, creating employee questions and slow month-end reconciliation.
prd.problem: Leave balances, clock records, and approval history are separated, creating employee questions and slow month-end reconciliation.
prd.solution: Connect leave policy, requests and approvals, attendance exceptions, balance calculations, and organization reporting in one flow.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee requesting leave or recording attendance
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Leave balances, clock records, and approval history are separated, creating employee questions and slow month-end reconciliation.

targets.name: HR and attendance operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Leave balances, clock records, and approval history are separated, creating employee questions and slow month-end reconciliation.

scenarios.text: Employee requesting leave or recording attendance completes leave request and attendance record submission and checks progress.
HR and attendance operations coordinator reviews leave usage and attendance reporting by organization.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Process 95% of leave requests through self-service and reduce attendance reconciliation errors by 30%.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Leave request and attendance record submission
Leave balance and attendance status lookup
Manager approval, rejection, and attendance-exception handling
Leave usage and attendance reporting by organization
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
